vlm_note: Clean 8-piece opening board (score 0-0), board fitted from empty_baseline (residual 1.00px). Colours per meta: ThePhantom=BLACK, BigSlip=RED. Read against the CV's own vertex-id overlay. ThePhantom settlements v3=[0,1,6] and v18=[4,13,14] (roads v3-v2, v18-v17); BigSlip settlements v7=[1,7,8] and v0=[0,3,4] (roads v7-v24, v0-v5). GRANT SELF-CHECK PASSES: ThePhantom's grant {BRICK:1,WOOD:2} equals exactly v18's hexes (WOO10+BRI5+WOO8) and NOT v3's (WHE11+WHE5+SHE6); BigSlip's grant {ORE:1,WHEAT:1,WOOD:1} equals exactly v0's hexes (WHE11+ORE9+WOO10) and NOT v7's (WHE5+BRI9+BRI10). Each grant matches EXACTLY ONE settlement, so the glyph anchor independently pins the 2nd (granting) settlement for both players.
